message:
Enable macOS installer coverage

Re-enable the macOS installer workflow on macos-15 and test both
latest and main tags. This covers the new Homebrew install path
on Apple Silicon while keeping the direct pkg fallback checked for
non-latest installs.

files.patch:
@@ -26,15 +26,19 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - name: Run installer
         run: curl -fsSL https://get.tenzir.app -o /tmp/tenzir-install.sh && sh /tmp/tenzir-install.sh
-  # stock-macos:
-  #   name: Provided MacOS runners
-  #   strategy:
-  #     matrix:
-  #       image: [macos-12, macos-13]
-  #   runs-on: ${{ matrix.image }}
-  #   steps:
-  #     - name: Run installer
-  #       run: curl https://get.tenzir.app | sh
+  stock-macos:
+    name: Provided macOS runners
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        image: [macos-15]
+        tag: ["latest", "main"]
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.image }}
+    env:
+      TENZIR_PACKAGE_TAG: ${{ matrix.tag }}
+    steps:
+      - name: Run installer
+        run: curl -fsSL https://get.tenzir.app -o /tmp/tenzir-install.sh && sh /tmp/tenzir-install.sh
   container-debian-based:
     name: Debian based distros in containers
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -93,7 +97,7 @@ jobs:
   notify-failure:
     name: Notify on failure
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: [stock-linux, container-debian-based, container-redhat-based]
+    needs: [stock-linux, stock-macos, container-debian-based, container-redhat-based]
     if: failure()
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
